candidates.why: This D&A row appears within the cost-of-revenues section, but it sits as a component alongside other cost lines and above the selected parent total 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. It is also blank in the preview, so there is no clear separate same-level operating D&A amount to add outside the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. The visible 'Depreciation & Amortization' in the production/COGS area appears to be a component of that total rather than a separate add-on row. Conservative choice avoids double counting.

candidates.why: This D&A row appears directly under 'Sales and administration costs' with other apparent sub-components, indicating it is embedded within the selected SG&A parent bucket rather than a separate same-level line to add later.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is 'Sales and administration costs'. The explicit D&A row appears to be a component nested under that SG&A total, so it should not be added separately.
